title: Post by thequantumbrief
description:
In 1977, inventor Itzhak Bentov met with intelligence officials to share a radical idea: The universe is a hologram within human awareness.

The CIA later produced a classified 29-page report titled Analysis and Assessment of Gateway Process. It concluded that human consciousness could move beyond physical space and time.

The Missing Page 25 Kept classified for decades, this page eventually revealed statements like “Time is a construct of the conscious mind” and that “There is no past or future, only NOW.” This linked meditation, quantum theory, and brainwave synchronization into a practical framework.

The Method Bentov’s approach involved entering the theta state, synchronizing both brain hemispheres using binaural beats, and applying focused intention to reshape memory and influence probability.

The Tragic End Bentov died in the 1979 Flight 191 crash while traveling to present his findings. He left behind a powerful legacy and one core message:

“You are not a body living in the universe. You are the universe experiencing itself through a body.”
